headline: T-Mobile tackles a major customer frustration in plan switching
summary: T-Mobile appears to be making good on its promise to double down on removing customer pain points. Amid recent headwinds in its business, the phone carrier has quietly added a new feature in its T-Life app designed to make switching plans more seamless for customers. However, the new feature ...
